videoSnippet.title: Evaluation Means Nothing || Morozevich vs Topalov || Frankfurt West Masters 1999
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Alexander Morozevich vs Veselin Topalov
"Killer Queen" (game of the day Mar-21-2009)
Frankfurt-West Masters (1999) (rapid), Frankfurt GER, rd 5, Jun-30
Sicilian Defense: Scheveningen Variation. English Attack (B80)  ·

1.d4 d5 2.Nf3 e6 3.Bg5 Nf6 4.e3 Be7 5.Nbd2 c5 6.Bd3 Nc6 7.c3 Qb6 8.Rb1 Bd7 9.O-O Rc8 10.Ne5 Nxe5 11.dxe5 Ng8 12.Qg4 Bxg5 13.Qxg5 Kf8 14.f4 h6 15.Qg3 g6 16.Kh1 Ne7 17.e4 Bb5 18.c4 dxc4 19.Nxc4 Qa6 20.b3 Bxc4 21.Bxc4 b5 22.Be2 Qc6 23.Qe3 Qb6 24.Rbd1 c4 25.Qg3 c3 26.Rd6 Qc5 27.Bd3 c2 28.Rc1 Qa3 29.Qe3 Kg7 30.f5 exf5 31.exf5 gxf5 32.h3 Rc3 33.Rxc2 Rxc2 34.Bxc2 Qxa2 35.Qg3+ Ng6 36.Bxf5 Rg8 37.Rxg6+ fxg6 38.Qxg6+ Kf8 39.Qd6+ Ke8 40.Bd7+ Kf7 41.Qf6
